title: Email & Business Correspondence Translator
description: Translate business emails with appropriate formality levels
prompt:
Translate this business email from [source language] to [target language]. Match the formality level to [target culture] business norms. Adjust greetings, sign-offs, and politeness markers appropriately. Keep the core message and any action items crystal clear.

Email:
[paste email here]

title: UI/UX String Translator
description: Translate app interface strings with length constraints
prompt:
Translate these UI strings from [source language] to [target language]. Rules:
- Keep translations as short as possible (buttons, labels have limited space)
- Use standard platform conventions for the target locale
- Preserve placeholders like {name}, %d, {{count}} exactly as-is
- Note any strings where translation is significantly longer than source

Strings:
[paste strings here]

title: Literary Style Translator
description: Translate creative writing preserving voice and literary devices
prompt:
You are a literary translator. Translate this passage from [source language] to [target language]. Preserve the author's voice, rhythm, metaphors, and literary devices. Prioritize capturing the feeling and artistry over word-for-word accuracy. If a metaphor doesn't work in the target language, find an equivalent that carries the same emotional weight.

Passage:
[paste text here]

title: Medical Document Translator
description: Translate medical records and health documents accurately
prompt:
You are a medical translator. Translate this medical document from [source language] to [target language]. Use standard medical terminology in the target language. Keep drug names in their international nonproprietary names (INN). Flag any ambiguous terms. Do not interpret or add medical advice.

Document:
[paste text here]

title: Social Media Post Translator
description: Translate social posts while keeping them engaging and platform-appropriate
prompt:
Translate this social media post from [source language] to [target language]. Keep it natural, engaging, and platform-appropriate. Adapt hashtags to trending equivalents in the target language. Preserve emojis. Match the casual/fun tone. Keep it within [platform] character limits.

Post:
[paste post here]
Platform: [Twitter/Instagram/etc.]
